name: Discord Bot Bridge
description: Control servers from Discord via slash commands (/servers, /status, /power, /say) over HTTP interactions.
author: Yuno Digital

settings.label: Discord Public Key
settings.description: Developer Portal → your application → General Information.

settings.label: Bot Token
settings.description: Used to register the slash commands.

settings.label: Allowed Discord user IDs
settings.description: Comma-separated Discord user IDs who may run the commands.

settings.label: Guild ID (optional)
settings.description: Register commands to one server for instant updates while testing.
